name: Ketamini
description: Anesitetiki dissociative ti n pese analgesia, sedation, ati amnesia lakoko titọju awọn ifasilẹ ọna atẹgun ati iduroṣinṣin hemodynamic. Analgesic ti o fẹ ni TCCC - n ṣetọju BP laisi awọn opioids. Tun lo fun sedation ilana ati RSI.
dose: Analgesia: 0.1-0.3 mg / kg IV / IO (titari lọra) | 0,5 mg / kg IM. Idaduro ilana: 1-2 mg / kg IV | 4-6 mg / kg IM. Idawọle RSI: 1-2 mg / kg IV.
contraindications: schizophrenia ti a mọ tabi psychosis ti nṣiṣe lọwọ
ICP ti o ga laisi aabo oju-ofurufu (ẹ ibatan)
warnings: Awọn aati pajawiri (delirium/hallucinations) -- mitigate pẹlu midazolam 1-2mg IV ti o ba wa.
Ṣe alekun awọn aṣiri -- ni imurasilẹ afamora.
Laryngospasm toje ṣugbọn o ṣee ṣe - jẹ ki BVM wa.

pediatric.dose: Analgesia: 0.5 mg / kg IV. Idaduro ilana: 1-2 mg / kg IV | 4-5 mg / kg IM.
pediatric.note: Ti ṣe iwadi daradara ni awọn itọju ọmọde. Ayanfẹ fun awọn ilana irora.

obstetric.note: Ailewu fun analgesia iya ni awọn iwọn kekere. Le fa ibanujẹ atẹgun ọmọ tuntun ni awọn iwọn giga ti o ba fi jiṣẹ nitosi akoko ifijiṣẹ.

source: JTS CPG: Acute Pain Management / TCCC Guidelines
